Minimum Average(s) Required: A minimum cumulative overall average of 60.0%.
See major for required major average.

Unit Requirements.Three-Year General degrees: Complete a total of 15.0 units, with a minimum of 8.0 units at the 200-level or above.

majors.Liberal Studies major: A minimum of 12.5 units must be at the 200-level or above.
majors.All other Arts majors: A minimum of 8.0 units must be at the 200-level or above.

majors.Liberal Studies major: A minimum of 12.5 units must be at the 200-level or above.
majors.All other Arts majors: A minimum of 8.0 units must be at the 200-level or above.

Breadth Requirements.description: All Bachelor of Arts (BA) students must meet the BA Breadth Requirements.

requirements.name: Transdisciplinary Studies
requirements.additionalNote: Any course taken in another University of Waterloo faculty may also count.

notes: Language courses accepted as transfer credits (e.g., LANG) may be counted towards the Languages and Cultures requirement.
No more than 1.0 unit in the same discipline may count towards the Social Sciences requirement.
Cross-listed courses may be designated to fulfil only one requirement.
ARTS160 or ARTS160E do not fulfil any breadth requirement.
Professional Development (PD) courses do not fulfil any breadth requirement.
Renamed subject codes count towards the same requirement they previously fulfilled (e.g., SPCOM counted as COMMST).
Students enrolled prior to September 2008 may refer to Group A and B requirements or petition to follow the new Breadth Requirements.

Undergraduate Communication Requirement.description: All Bachelor of Arts students must meet the Undergraduate Communication Requirement by completing ARTS160 or ARTS160E.
notes: Students are expected to complete ARTS160 or ARTS160E by the end of their 1B term.
Failure to complete the course by the end of the 2B term results in a hold preventing course enrolment.
After two failed attempts, students may petition the Arts Examinations and Standings Committee for a third attempt.
Completion of this requirement in another University of Waterloo faculty satisfies the requirement.
Transfer students may request an exemption with proof of an equivalent course.
ARTS160 or ARTS160E does not satisfy any Breadth Requirement.
Students following earlier calendar years should consult their plan-year requirements.
